object_a.label: art
object_a.description: series of framed pictures along stair wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Multiple small-to-medium framed prints (black and light-colored frames) arranged in a diagonal pattern following the stair line; subjects appear nautical or landscape-themed (light blues and creams). Frames are mounted on the beige wall above the railing.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted along the wall above and behind the staircase banister
